properties.description: Multiple workers share a job queue; each worker independently dequeues, applies, and logs results
applied_ids.txt persists job IDs across sessions; workers check before applying
navigateApplyForm() steps through multi-page apply wizard filling fields, handling next buttons and confirmations
scrollToLoadAll() repeatedly scrolls to trigger lazy-loaded job cards in SPAs before extracting
answerQuestions() / answerScreeningQuestions() iterates radio groups and selects, auto-selecting preferred answers
TITLE_ALLOW_RE and TITLE_BLOCK_RE applied to job titles to filter DS/ML roles and exclude DBA/analyst roles
Function to discard jobs older than 24-48h window before queuing
CONFIRM_RE regex matches success page text to detect successful application submission
wlog() prefixes log lines with ANSI color codes based on worker index for multi-worker readability
candidates.find(...) pattern resolves which resume PDF to upload from a priority-ordered list
~/.openclaw/workspace/*.json written every 5s by bots for real-time external monitoring
After N consecutive empty nationwide scans, bot iterates per-city search URLs
Bullhorn staffing ATS used by Vaco and Yoh (via Shazamme); REST API at jobs.vaco.com/api
Phenom People ATS used by TekSystems; careers.teksystems.com; JP-XXXXXXX job IDs
SmartRecruiters ATS used by RobertHalf
WPJobBoard WordPress plugin ATS used by Matlen Silver; inline form revealed via ?form=apply
~/randstad-bot-profile is used by both randstad-bot.js and randstad-ds-bot.js — one login covers both bots
shadowClick() / shadow DOM querySelector chains used by Dice bot to reach elements inside web components
fetchVacoJobsPage() uses Node.js https module (not browser Playwright) to call undocumented Bullhorn JSON API
decodeSlug() base64url-decodes SPA hash route tokens to extract real Kforce job IDs
fillEEO() fills equal employment opportunity self-identification fields: ethnicity, gender, disability, veteran status

links.evidence: 4 parallel workers sharing a job queue in randstad-bot.js
Randstad-DS is a specialized variant of the base Randstad bot targeting the same ATS with shared login but no date filter and 8 workers
wlog() colored worker logger in randstad-bot.js
4 parallel workers with Promise.all in roberthalf-bot.js
RobertHalf bot iterates LOCATIONS array after 3 empty nationwide scans
TITLE_BLOCK_RE blocks data engineer/analyst/BI roles in roberthalf-bot.js
wlog() colored worker logger in roberthalf-bot.js
Both implement logReport() to live report_TIMESTAMP.txt and share navigateApplyForm + answerQuestions pattern
Both are dry-run single-job probes with no login, custom WordPress-derived ATSs, similar debug/screenshot helpers
Vaco uses Bullhorn REST API at jobs.vaco.com/api/requisitions/search
wlog() colored worker logger in vaco-bot.js
candidates.find() pattern in vaco-bot.js; 512KB size limit enforced
fetchVacoJobsPage() uses Node.js https module to query Bullhorn REST API
Both use Dropzone.js-style file upload inputs and have auto-login credential-fill with fallback
Matlen Silver uses WPJobBoard WordPress plugin with ?form=apply inline reveal
Dice bot iterates 10 US tech hub cities after consecutive empty nationwide scans
scrollToLoadAll() in dice-bot.js for Dice SPA lazy loading
All bots in suite write status JSON to ~/.openclaw/workspace/ every 5s per architecture spec
wlog() colored worker logger in dice-bot.js
shadowClick() function for Dice.com web component header nav elements
8 parallel workers (double the standard) in randstad-ds-bot.js
wlog() colored worker logger in kforce-bot.js
decodeSlug() base64url decodes SPA hash route tokens
TekSystems runs on Phenom People ATS at careers.teksystems.com with JP-XXXXXXXXX job IDs
navigateApplyForm() with fillPersonalInfo + uploadResume + answerScreeningQuestions in teksystems-bot.js
answerScreeningQuestions() fills radio/select + years-of-experience + salary in teksystems-bot.js
setInterval status heartbeat every 5s in teksystems-bot.js
wlog() colored worker logger in teksystems-bot.js
Yoh uses Shazamme frontend backed by Bullhorn ATS at jobs.yoh.com
fillApplyForm() + fillEEO() multi-step form flow in yoh-bot.js
wlog() colored worker logger in yoh-bot.js
fillEEO() fills ethnicity, gender, disability, veteran fields in yoh-bot.js
API-fetched job list is loaded into the shared worker queue rather than scraped page-by-page by each worker
